creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Reproduce:

1. make /etc/malloc.conf:
ln -sf 'metadata_thp:disabled,retain:true,dss:disabled,narenas:8,background_thread:false,tcache:true,lg_tcache_max:16' /etc/malloc.conf

2. run:
env MK_UBSAN=no COMPILER_RESOURCE_DIR__a4679e21=/usr/lib/clang/19 VENDOR=amd LINKER_VERSION__f0066807=190104 SSH_CLIENT="172.16.0.3 45626 22" COMPILER_FREEBSD_VERSION__fbe3d07a=1400006 X_COMPILER_VERSION__fbe3d07a=190104 X_COMPILER_FREEBSD_VERSION__fbe3d07a=1400006 OSRELDATE=1402501 _REVISION=14.2 X_LINKER_VERSION__e7abd9ad=190104 MK_ASAN=no LINKER_FEATURES__dddc7b4c="build-id ifunc retpoline ifunc-noplt" CCACHE_BIN=/usr/local/bin/ccache LOGNAME=root PKG_WWW="https://www.FreeBSD.org" LANG=en_US.UTF-8 PAGER=more X_LINKER_FEATURES__f0066807="build-id ifunc retpoline ifunc-noplt"
